title: erigeron pumilus subsp. pumilus
intro: Erigeron pumilus subsp. pumilus, also known as dwarf fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The plant's medicinal properties have been linked to several health benefits, including the ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. Erigeron pumilus subsp. pumilus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile herb for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
